source.name: Lab 6.2: Training and Testing
source.instructions:
This assessment only checks that you ran Rasa Inspector with a log file as in the lab:

• Check 1: The file level2/logs/logs.out exists (create the logs folder first, then run inspect with --log-file logs/logs.out).
• Check 2: That file contains evidence that Inspector / the server started.

It does not re-check your domain or training (those are covered in Lab 4.1 and Lab 6.1).
source.guidance: From the level2 folder (venv active), run mkdir -p logs, then python -m rasa inspect --debug --log-file logs/logs.out. On Windows PowerShell, run mkdir logs first. Wait until the server has started so logs/logs.out contains Inspector output, then run Check It! again.
